title: Assign multiple teams to a people column with automation

posts.author: tibor93 (Tibor Tasi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

It would be really great if I could add multi teams to a People column with automation. Right now, If I try to add more than one it gets overwritten.

The same solution would be ideal like in case of person assignment, so I could click on the “assign” text as well so I could choose to replace the existing one or adding additional one.

Thank you!
